author: CMS-LUMI-POG
body: New pileup scenario for Run 3, based on the assumption of a 10h fill with an initial 2h leveling period. Details about the assumptions and considered effects have been presented in the PPD meeting [here](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1045566/#36-update-of-pu-profile-for-ru). We tested running cmsDriver with `--pileup 2022_LHC_Simulation_10h_2h` by hand and found no problems.
title: New Run3 pileup scenario: 10h fill, 2h leveling
